title: fix(billing): retry stripe webhooks on transient 503 (closes #4203)
body:
## What
Stripe's webhook delivery occasionally returns 503 during their incident windows. We currently treat these as terminal failures and drop the event, leaving subscriptions out of sync.

## Why
Issue #4203 traced a customer's missing renewal to a 503 dropped silently in March. We're adding a bounded retry (3 attempts, exponential backoff) and dead-lettering the rest to the audit log for manual review.

## Testing
- New unit tests in `tests/billing/test_stripe_retry.py` cover the retry/backoff/dead-letter paths.
- Hit the staging webhook with `tools/stripe_replay.py` and verified retries happen as configured.

Closes #4203.
